200.description: Details about the selected invoice line.

IdUserCreation.description: Id of the user who created the ressource.

DateCreation.description: Date on which the ressource was created.

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdSegment.description: Id of the segment related to the ressource.

IdAddressBusiness.description: Id of the Billing Address of the Seller.

IdAddressBilling.description: Id of the Billing Address of the Customer.

DateIssue.description: Date when the Invoice has been issued.

Status.description:
High-level functional state of an invoice, exposed to end users.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| Draft | Not yet issued — the only state with no invoice number. |
| Due | Issued and awaiting payment. |
| Paid | Payment received. |
| Problem | Not paid, or payment was charged back. |
| Void | Issued by mistake and cancelled. |
| Uncollectible | Was due but payment cannot be collected or was charged back. |
Status.title: InvoiceFunctionalStatus

StateInvoice.description:
Granular technical state of an invoice. Each value maps to a functional Status.

| Value | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Draft | Draft | Basic draft. |
| DraftCharging | Draft | Being charged; will be issued if the charge succeeds. |
| DueAuto | Due | Due and automatically processed. |
| DueOffline | Due | Due; offline payment expected. |
| DueToProcess | Due | Due; will be processed later (e.g., batch). |
| DuePending | Due | Due; payment pending. |
| Paid | Paid | Invoice paid. |
| PaidRefunded | Paid | Paid but subsequently refunded. |
| ProblemAuto | Problem | Automated payment encountered issues. |
| ProblemOverdue | Problem | Invoice overdue. |
| ProblemDisputed | Problem | Payment disputed. |
| Void | Void | Cancelled before payment attempt. |
| Uncollectible | Uncollectible | Payment cannot be collected. |
StateInvoice.title: InvoiceStatus

TypePayment.description:
Type of payment

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Free | Subscription is free, no payment ever requested. |
| ExternalCheck | Payment with check. |
| ExternalCash | Payment with cash. |
| ExternalBank | Payment by wire transfer. |
| ExternalOther | Other payment type. |
| Card | Payment with payment card, automated renewal. |
| DirectDebit | Payment with bank account info, automated renewal. |
TypePayment.title: PaymentTypes

204.description: No results. Response body is Empty

401.description: Invalid or no credentials passed in the request

Message.description: A message localized in your language.

403.description: The operation cannot be processed. The response contains a JSON error object with more information

Message.description: A message localized in your language.
